title: The Captives Struggle to Breathe
description: On pages 5–8, the captives struggle to breathe as mr. 3 tightens his plan around the captured crew, forcing Luffy and Usopp to fight through smoke, wax, and Baroque Works tricks.
scene: The Captives Struggle to Breathe. Mr. 3 tightens his plan around the captured crew, forcing Luffy and Usopp to fight through smoke, wax, and Baroque Works tricks. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: Caugh! Caugh!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: My chest... hurts...!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: The mist of wax is getting in our lungs! At this rate, we'll be turned into wax-figures from inside our bodies...!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Fuhahahahaha! Yes, yes! Suffer as much as you can until you die!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Your expression of pain and anguish is the art I seek! Harden away into wax in terror!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Art!? You're depraved!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry?
dialogue.text: How could you do such an inhumane thing to Brogy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You'll all get your just desserts soon enough!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Fuhahahahaha! Yes, scream in desperation as much as you want!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Zoro! Don't just stand there quietly! Do something!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: 100 years...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: day after day after day,

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: We fought and fought...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: endlessly fighting and fighting...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Our duel was sustained only by our pride born from Elbaf.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If this is how the two of us meet our end then... Elbaf...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Art thou not too cruel...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Why will you not let us die in battle...!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Fulhha- Hahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What a most amusing face you make! It's exquisite!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Your bitter-ness!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Lament!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: And Agony! You'll become an excellent work of art for sure! Fuhahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: Kyaha- Hahahahahahahahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Elbaf!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Fuka- Haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: My hand won't move...I no! I don't want to die like this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Isn't there something we can do!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Tuare

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: My body's hardened already!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Can you still move, giant?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: tearing off your arms and legs,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: will be a lot more useful than being dead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I can still move as well.

summary: This part centers on the captives struggle to breathe, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
